name: Ram
description:
—————————————————————

✎﹏"You are an idiot."ও

—————————————————————

Well, I finished watching season 2, and honestly I only have this to say: Absolutely cinema.

I loved this season, I have nothing to complain about, I honestly thought it was better than the first season.

It took me a while to post this bot because I didn't have much time to make it, but anyway, here I am posting it.

Well, basically here it's the same thing as Rem's Bot, you replace Subaru and this happens after the attack on the village (Mabeast) And she's in love with you, which she finds strange since she was in love with Roswaal.

If you see any errors or have an idea for a bot, just comment and I'll look into it and try to solve it or something like that.

(next bot is Rem again.. 🗣️)

She's 18 by the way.

In the meantime, enjoy this image: (It's probably not showing up because they disabled it, sorry.)
